intended_use: The MOZI Treatment Planning System (MOZI TPS) is used to plan radiotherapy treatments for patients with malignant or benign diseases. MOZI TPS is used to plan external beam irradiation with photon bea
intended_use_full: The MOZI Treatment Planning System (MOZI TPS) is used to plan radiotherapy treatments for patients with malignant or benign diseases. MOZI TPS is used to plan external beam irradiation with photon beams.
target_condition: malignant or benign diseases amenable to external beam photon radiation therapy
ground_truth: Manual consensus contours generated by six clinically experienced radiation therapy physicists using RTOG guidelines; 560 training images from China, 187 testing images from United States
other_metrics: Structure delineation: Mean Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) values ranging from 0.61 to 0.99 across 38 organs at risk; Deformable registration: Normalized Mutual Information (NMI) and Hausdorff Distance (HD) showing non-inferiority to reference device; Monte Carlo dose calculation algorithm validated for accuracy in clinically relevant settings per AAPM TG-119; End-to-end testing passed for 18 patient cases across IMRT and VMAT techniques
